candidates.why: Explicit revenue line; matches top-line revenue definition and equals the total revenue values.
Explicit total revenue line with identical values to 'Revenue from contracts with customers'; best primary choice for top-line.
Represents operating profit, not revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Non-operating finance income, not revenue from operations.
Interest income, not operating revenue.
Earnings before tax, not revenue.
Tax line, not revenue.
Comprehensive income after taxes, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not a revenue line.

variables.notes: Both revenue rows carry identical values; 'Total Revenue' is chosen as primary with 'Revenue from contracts with customers' as fallback per priority rule.

candidates.why: Direct cost of materials used in production; best proxy for cost of goods sold.
Likely includes both production and overhead personnel; better treated as SG&A component than pure COGS.
Mixed operating overhead; more appropriate for SG&A than COGS.
R&D expense, not general cost of goods sold.
Aggregate operating result, not a specific COGS line.

candidates.row_label: Expense relating to leases of low-value assets
candidates.why: Specific lease-related operating cost; not the main COGS bucket.
Specific lease-related operating cost; not the main COGS bucket.
Inventory asset, not period expense; not suitable for COGS mapping.

variables.notes: ‘Raw materials’ is the clearest direct production cost line and best mapped as COGS; other candidates are operating overhead or non-COGS items.

candidates.why: Personnel-related operating costs; typical SG&A component excluding COGS-specific personnel which is not separately identified.
Broad operating overhead bucket; standard SG&A component.
Equity reserve on balance sheet, not an expense; not SG&A.

variables.notes: No explicit single SG&A line exists; thus the main overhead components ‘Personnel expenses’ and ‘Other operating expenses’ are selected, excluding totals and non-expense balance-sheet items.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line in the income statement; matches XRD definition.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of previously capitalized R&D; a depreciation/amortization item rather than current-period R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not period expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-asset; not period expense presentation.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing asset value; not an income statement R&D expense line.

variables.notes: Direct income statement ‘Research & Development Expense’ is used for XRD; amortization of capitalized R&D is excluded as it is a D&A item.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Primary interest expense line; best representation of financing cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest component of lease liabilities; secondary interest expense line that may be needed for some periods.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of the same lease interest; less preferred than main line items.
Interest income, opposite sign to interest expense; should not be used for XINT.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: XINT is mapped as a priority list: main interest expense net of capitalized interest, with lease interest expense as a fallback for years where the primary line may be missing or incomplete.

candidates.why: Component of equity, not total equity attributable to owners; incomplete for BE.
Represents total shareholders’ equity; best proxy for book equity attributable to owners in absence of a more specific parent/owner line.
Appears to be identical in value to ‘Shareholders' Equity - Total’; redundant alternative label.
Technical balancing row; should not be used as BE.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row; not an equity subtotal.
Sum of total equity and total liabilities; not appropriate for BE.

variables.notes: ‘Shareholders' Equity - Total’ is used as BE. ‘Total Equity’ appears to duplicate this amount; only one is selected to avoid redundancy. No separate non-controlling interests line is present.

No balance sheet line for minority interests or non-controlling interests is present (e.g., no ‘Non-controlling interests’ or ‘Minority interest’ row). MIB is therefore set to 0 via an empty selection.
